source_condition: EN-asset-is-English (en.json holds English values; EN asset text fields are English; title field still JP)
scene_summary: Myrtille (ミルティーユ) bakes late at night for the Sweets Contest; the Commander finds her, then a bear cub appears and taste-tests her tarts to help her choose which to enter. Cute/wholesome, not H-18.

title.jp: お菓子の国のパティシエとして
title.en_meaning: As a Patissier of the Sweets Kingdom
title.vi: Với Tư Cách Là Thợ Làm Bánh Của Vương Quốc Bánh Ngọt
title.note: Title Case Vietnamese per skill rule 14; JP title translated via EN meaning.

messageTextCenter.note: size tag preserved; Title Case Vietnamese.

encoding.comma_style: U+201A (‚) used inside Vietnamese text fields; fullwidth '，' from EN asset NOT carried into VI (replaced by ‚)

h18: none — scene is wholesome baking content; adult-content rule not triggered
notes: EN asset uses fullwidth '，' inside English text; VI replaces with '‚' (U+201A) per skill rule 6.

count mirrored exactly from EN asset on every text line (preflight guard, 0 mismatches).
